narrative:
Virgil van Dijk is a formidable Centre-Back for the Kingdom of the Netherlands. His overall rating of 7.55/10 places him among the top 1% of centre-backs at this tournament. This rating reflects both his club form over the last two seasons and his current World Cup performances.

At this World Cup, van Dijk demonstrates exceptional defensive presence, averaging 8.0 clearances and 1.0 interception per 90 minutes. Notably, he has contributed 0.333 goals and 0.333 assists per 90 minutes, despite a low expected goals of 0.032 and expected assists of 0.04 per 90 minutes. This indicates an extremely efficient attacking output from a centre-back position.
